title: Crispy Chicken Savory Crumble
description: A gluten-free, savory crumble topping with crispy chicken, perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Cut the chicken into 1-inch pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Roll the chicken pieces in the savory crumble topping until evenly coated.
Heat the butter in a skillet over medium-high heat and cook the crumble-coated chicken until browned.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
Optional: Serve with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad for a well-rounded meal.
